title: Rising sun 2.0: As Japan shrugs off its pacifist shackles, India could make significant gains
description: Tokyo is shedding its post-war pacifism and easing curbs on weapon exports. Given strong bilateral ties, India could access some high-tech defence equipment it may be willing to sell. Japan’s rise as a military power could also help reduce geopolitical bipolarity, which would suit New Delhi too.
